description_long: This stuffed toy is modeled after SpongeBob SquarePants, featuring a rectangular, yellow, sponge-like body with numerous rounded holes and a cheerful, expressive face. The toy has large, round blue eyes, a wide open mouth with two prominent front teeth, and a red tongue visible inside. Its arms are thin and outstretched, ending in mitten-like hands, while its legs are short and clad in white socks with blue and red stripes, and black shoes. The toy wears a white shirt, brown square pants, and a red tie, with black belt details and white shirt cuffs. The back of the toy is plain yellow with sponge holes, and the sides show the thickness of the sponge body. The overall appearance is soft, plush, and inviting, with vibrant colors and cartoonish proportions.
description: A plush SpongeBob SquarePants toy with a yellow, holey sponge body, expressive face, and classic outfit including brown pants, white shirt, and red tie.
description_view_0: Front view showing SpongeBob's smiling face, large blue eyes, outstretched arms, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the sponge body, profile of the face, and extended arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain yellow back with sponge holes, brown pants, and both legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the sponge body thickness, profile of the face, and extended arm.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and happy, with wide open blue eyes, raised eyebrows, and a big open-mouthed smile showing two prominent front teeth.
attribute_clothing_or_accessories: white socks with blue and red stripes
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms outstretched to the sides and legs slightly apart.
